name: Slimy Sexual Entrapment
outcome: Now that you're hopelessly deep in their gooey slime lake, the voluptuous villainesses easily push you down into their sinfully comfortable jiggly bed, one of them mounting your dick while the other two kiss your ears, the lustful dark slimes panting with eerie eagerness as they prepare to fuck you senseless.
miss: Now deep in their gooey lake slime, the trio of voluptuous villainesses surrounding you attempt to push you down into the jiggly bed surrounding you, but you manage to keep them at bay!
